productDisplayName: Lotto Men Mega Sport Navy Blue Slipper
description: Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with an arty upper that makes it a stylish buy. Upper Soft synthetic leather straps with a padded fabric inner lining and twill tape toe separator for abrasion-free comfort and to hold the foot in place Ergonomically raised lugs on the footbed for an all-day massage feel Outsole TPR outsole with strategiclaly placed lugs for absolute grip and traction Slipper care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
